text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Teach! Thanks for giving me a day off!
choice_data_list: Were you able to rest well?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yep. You told me to rest, so I did just that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right. Now it's your turn to blow my
expectations outta the water.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I bet you spent your time off cookin' up a real
killer of a training regimen for me, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I knew I could count on ya! All right, let's get
training, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is raring to go after some much
needed rest!
